title: Storage Services in Los Angeles | Short & Long Term — SOS Moving
metaDescription: Secure moving storage in Los Angeles & SF — climate-controlled, short & long term options. Safe for furniture, documents & valuables. Get a free storage quote!
heroSubtitle: Get access to secure moving and storage services that we offer to help you have a blissful relocation experience.

sections.title: Storage Solutions for Your Los Angeles Move
sections.content: Moving does not always happen in one smooth step. Sometimes there is a gap between your move-out and move-in dates. Sometimes a renovation forces you out of your home for a few weeks. Sometimes you are downsizing and need time to decide what stays and what goes. In all of these situations, you need a safe place for your belongings — and that is where our storage service comes in.Moving does not always happen in one smooth step. Sometimes there is a gap between your move-out and move-in dates. Sometimes a renovation forces you out of your home for a few weeks. Sometimes you are downsizing and need time to decide what stays and what goes. In all of these situations, you need a safe place for your belongings — and that is where our storage service comes in.SOS Moving provides secure, climate-controlled storage solutions for residential and commercial clients across Los Angeles and San Francisco. Whether you need to store a few boxes for a week or an entire household for several months, we have flexible options to fit your timeline and budget. Our storage services in Los Angeles are available as a standalone option or as part of a full moving package.SOS Moving provides secure, climate-controlled storage solutions for residential and commercial clients across Los Angeles and San Francisco. Whether you need to store a few boxes for a week or an entire household for several months, we have flexible options to fit your timeline and budget. Our storage services in Los Angeles are available as a standalone option or as part of a full moving package.What makes our storage different from a standard self-storage unit? We handle the entire process — storage pickup and delivery included. Our crew picks up your items at your location, wraps and protects everything using the same premium materials we use on moves, transports them to our facility, and delivers them back when you are ready. You never have to rent a truck, load boxes yourself, or make multiple trips to a storage facil

sections.title: Short-Term, Long-Term and In-Transit Storage
sections.content: ### Short-Term Storage### Short-Term StorageIdeal when you need to store belongings for a few days to a few weeks. Common scenarios include waiting for your new apartment keys, temporary relocation during home renovations, staging a home for sale, or bridging the gap between a lease ending and a new one starting. Short-term storage is billed on a flexible basis with no long-term commitment required. Many of our Los Angeles clients use short-term storage when their move-out and move-in dates do not align — a common situation in LA's competitive rental market.Ideal when you need to store belongings for a few days to a few weeks. Common scenarios include waiting for your new apartment keys, temporary relocation during home renovations, staging a home for sale, or bridging the gap between a lease ending and a new one starting. Short-term storage is billed on a flexible basis with no long-term commitment required. Many of our Los Angeles clients use short-term storage when their move-out and move-in dates do not align — a common situation in LA's competitive rental market.### Long-Term Storage### Long-Term StorageFor clients who need to store items for a month or more. This works well for seasonal furniture, business inventory, documents and files, or personal items that do not fit in your new space. Our long-term rates are designed to be affordable over extended periods. Your belongings stay protected in climate-controlled conditions for as long as you need — whether that is two months or two years. You can extend your storage period at any time without penalties.For clients who need to store items for a month or more. This works well for seasonal furniture, business inventory, documents and files, or personal items that do not fit in your new space. Our long-term rates are designed to be affordable over extended periods. sections.title: What You Can Store and Facility Details
sections.content: Our storage facilities are climate-controlled, meaning temperature and humidity are maintained year-round. This protects wood furniture from warping, electronics from moisture damage, and fabrics from mold. All units are monitored and secured.Our storage facilities are climate-controlled, meaning temperature and humidity are maintained year-round. This protects wood furniture from warping, electronics from moisture damage, and fabrics from mold. All units are monitored and secured.Items commonly stored with us include household furniture, mattresses and bed frames, appliances, electronics, boxes of personal belongings, documents and files, artwork, seasonal items and holiday decorations, business inventory, and office equipment.Items commonly stored with us include household furniture, mattresses and bed frames, appliances, electronics, boxes of personal belongings, documents and files, artwork, seasonal items and holiday decorations, business inventory, and office equipment.There are some items we cannot accept for safety and regulatory reasons: flammable or corrosive materials, explosives, propane tanks, batteries, and items that attract pests or are susceptible to mold and mildew. We also do not store perishable food items or live plants. If you are unsure whether a specific item can be stored, ask us during your consultation — we are happy to advise.There are some items we cannot accept for safety and regulatory reasons: flammable or corrosive materials, explosives, propane tanks, batteries, and items that attract pests or are susceptible to mold and mildew. We also do not store perishable food items or live plants. If you are unsure whether a specific item can be stored, ask us during your consultation — we are happy to advise.We have multiple storage unit sizes available. The right size depends on your inventory — from a small unit for a few boxes and seasonal items to a large unit that can hold the contents of a multi-bedroom home. During your free estimate,

sections.title: How Our Storage Service Works
sections.content: **Step 1 — Consultation.** Call 909-443-0004 or request a free estimate. Tell us what you need to store, how long you expect to need storage, and your timeline. We will recommend the right unit size and provide a clear quote.**Step 1 — Consultation.** Call 909-443-0004 or request a free estimate. Tell us what you need to store, how long you expect to need storage, and your timeline. We will recommend the right unit size and provide a clear quote.**Step 2 — Pickup and Packing.** On the scheduled day, our crew arrives at your location with all necessary materials. We wrap and protect every item — furniture gets moving blankets, fragile items get shrink wrap and padding, clothes go into wardrobe boxes. Everything is inventoried before loading.**Step 2 — Pickup and Packing.** On the scheduled day, our crew arrives at your location with all necessary materials. We wrap and protect every item — furniture gets moving blankets, fragile items get shrink wrap and padding, clothes go into wardrobe boxes. Everything is inventoried before loading.**Step 3 — Transport and Storage.** We load your items onto our truck and transport them to our secure, climate-controlled facility. Items are stored carefully to prevent shifting or damage during the storage period.**Step 3 — Transport and Storage.** We load your items onto our truck and transport them to our secure, climate-controlled facility. Items are stored carefully to prevent shifting or damage during the storage period.**Step 4 — Delivery.** When you are ready, call us and schedule a delivery date. Our crew retrieves your items from storage, transports them to your new location, and places everything where you want it — just like a standard move. If you are completing a local move or long-distance relocation, we can coordinate storage and delivery as one seamless process.**Step 4 — Delivery.** When you are ready, call us and schedule a delivery date.
